author: Anonymous
title: /TI/Gaslighting & Chill/
description: ITT we discuss the topic of gaslighting and how it's used in the TI phenomenon.  For an intro to the topic:  > https://drive.proton.me/urls/YK796E JJWC#A6X6BBzI5YzN   This is distinct from the reported experiences of gangstalking and constitutes a much more insidious effect on those that don't notice this is happening. Share personal experiences, ask questions, discuss how it relates to the broader topics related to this next-generation psychological warfare stuff.  And here's a bunch of guides / docs exploring most major aspects of this thing, geared towards limiting the harm it can inflict on its targets and how to expose its weaknesses. No matter what you believe it is - spirits, aliens, demons, hello kitty robot zombies - this is useful.  >> https://drive.proton.me/urls/V2ZQW2 W1V8#l6X
